# What a Journey

> A memoir and recovery companion by Michael Heron — an intimate account of recovering from a traumatic brain injury (TBI), paired with the Phoenix Journey, a clinical evidence-informed rehabilitation app.

What a Journey hosts the full memoir alongside Phoenix Journey, a TBI recovery platform with quests, daily protocols, breathing and cold-exposure practice, healing soundscapes, brain compass mapping, and an AI companion. This is a beta prototype for demonstration purposes; content is not medical advice.

## Book

- [Dedication](/dedication): Author's dedication.
- [Disclaimer](/disclaimer): Liability and beta prototype notice.

## App

- [Phoenix Journey Dashboard](/dashboard): Personal recovery path and quests.
- [Daily Protocol](/daily-protocol): Guided four-step daily recovery sequence.
- [Brain Compass](/brain-compass): Interactive brain map of affected regions.
- [Healing Soundscapes](/soundscapes): Frequency-based audio library.
- [Resources](/resources): TBI recovery resources and reading.
- [Directory](/directory): TBI organizations and support.
- [Carer Circle](/circle): Support hub for family and caregivers.
- [Install](/install): How to install the Phoenix Journey PWA.
- [Sign in](/auth): Account access.

## Optional

- [AI Companion](/ai-companion): Conversational support agent (requires sign-in).
- [Mind Training](/mind), [Breathing](/breathing), [Cold Exposure](/cold-exposure), [Insights](/insights), [Settings](/settings).
